response.step_by_step_log: 1. Reviewed video content: Shiranui Flare announcing BEMANI collab, introducing 'Silent Flame, Never Fade', mentioning cover songs, and merchandise. 2. response.global_summary: The video is an promotional announcement from VTuber Shiranui Flare regarding her collaboration with several BEMANI arcade games (Pop'n Music, Dance Dance Revolution, and Sound Voltex). She introduces a new original song, "Silent Flame, Never Fade," and discusses the inclusion of her cover songs and character assets into these games. She also announces a merchandise release and expresses her gratitude to the fans, developers, and game creators.

scenes.description: Shiranui Flare talks to the audience about the collaboration news while a game-themed overlay is shown.
A short preview of the song 'Silent Flame, Never Fade' plays in the background while the title and collaboration details are shown on screen. The song is an original release by Shiranui Flare.
Shiranui Flare continues to explain the details of the collaboration, including the inclusion of her cover songs.
A short preview of the song 'Silent Flame, Never Fade' plays again in the background.
Shiranui Flare concludes the video by talking about merchandise and expressing her gratitude.
